description: Users need a notification center where they can see unread badges, open a notification list, mark notifications read or unread, filter by read state, and clear all read notifications. Store read state so it persists across sessions.

userStories.title: Add read state to notifications schema
userStories.description: As a system, I need to store notification read state so it persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Read state column added to notifications
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add backend logic for notification actions
userStories.description: As a system, I need backend support to update notification state.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend supports marking notifications read or unread
Backend supports clearing all read notifications
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show unread badges in notification center
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see unread badges so I know if I have new notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Unread badge is visible in the UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Display notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to open a notification list to see my notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list UI is visible and populated
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add mark read/unread controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications as read or unread from the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Controls to mark read/unread are present
Actions update the backend state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add read state filter
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter control allows viewing read or unread notifications
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add clear read notifications action
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear action is visible
